descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 to win Centennial Cup Western semifinal 4-3.
descriptionLong: Dave Tomlinson scored three goals as the Richmond Sockeyes routed the Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 on April 17, 1987, to win the Centennial Cup Western best-of-seven semifinal 4-3. Richmond exploded for five goals in the second period, with additional goals from Clarke, Claringbull, Phillips, Gunn, McCormick, and Bobbitt. The Sockeyes outshot the Rustlers 39-34. Richmond advances to face the Humboldt Broncos in the Western final.
